svg.text: The design space — every dial we could turn
Bold colored lanes are what's running today. Dashed boxes are alternative slices, pre-/post-processing and model heads we could plug in without re-designing the system.

Read left → right: every video can be fed to the AI as the whole asset, as cut clips or as sampled frames; pre- and post-processing slot in on either side of the model. Today's stack uses passthrough for video, 1 fps sampling for frames, and 6 s cuts for clip text.
